title: calylophus serrulata var. spinulosus
intro: Calylophus serrulata var. spinulosus, also known as the yellow sand verbena, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of calylophus serrulata var. spinulosus are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
